nasb.text: So Tilgath-pilneser king of Assyria came against him and afflicted him instead of strengthening him.

esv.text: So Tiglath-pileser king of Assyria came against him and afflicted him instead of strengthening him.

cnv.text: 亞述王提革拉．毘尼色來到他那裡，不但沒有援助他，反倒欺壓他。

ccb.text: 亚述王提革拉·毗列色来到犹大后，不但不救他，反而压迫他。
